add-file-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add File Attachment Annotation to PDF
add-file-attachment-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an existing PDF, creating a FileSpecification and a FileAttachmentAnnotation, placing it on a page, and saving the document with the attached file.

attach-binary-file-to-pdf.title: Attach Binary File to PDF from Byte Array
attach-binary-file-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a FileSpecification from a byte array, embedding it in a PDF document, and adding a file attachment annotation to a page.

add-multiple-attachments-to-pdf.title: Add Multiple Attachments to a PDF
add-multiple-attachments-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to embed several files into a PDF by iterating a collection of file paths and saving the updated document.

add-custom-descriptions-to-pdf-attachmen.title: Add Custom Descriptions to PDF Attachments
add-custom-descriptions-to-pdf-attachmen.description: Shows how to embed files into a PDF and assign a custom description (and MIME type) to each attachment before saving the document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-attachment-to-pdf-and-save.title: Add Attachment to PDF and Save to Output Folder
add-attachment-to-pdf-and-save.description: Shows how to load a PDF, embed a file as an attachment, and save the updated document to a specified output directory.

list-pdf-attachment-names-sizes.title: List PDF Attachment Names and Sizes
list-pdf-attachment-names-sizes.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its embedded file attachments, and iterate through them to output each attachment's name and size.

extract-attachment-by-name-from-pdf.title: Extract Attachment by Name from PDF
extract-attachment-by-name-from-pdf.description: The example creates a PDF with an embedded file, then loads the PDF, locates the attachment by its name, and saves it to a specified directory.

extract-pdf-attachments-to-subfolders.title: Extract PDF Attachments to Separate Subfolders
extract-pdf-attachments-to-subfolders.description: Demonstrates how to read embedded files from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and save each attachment into its own subfolder on disk.

remove-pdf-attachment-by-index.title: Remove PDF Attachment by Index
remove-pdf-attachment-by-index.description: Shows how to delete an embedded file from a PDF using its zero‑based index by retrieving the attachment name and calling the EmbeddedFiles collection's Delete method.

delete-pdf-attachment-by-filename.title: Delete PDF Attachment by Filename
delete-pdf-attachment-by-filename.description: Demonstrates how to remove an embedded file from a PDF by specifying its filename using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-pdf-attachment-metadata.title: Extract PDF Attachment Metadata to JSON
extract-pdf-attachment-metadata.description: Shows how to read file attachment annotations from a PDF, retrieve their creation date, file name, title and subject, and write the collected metadata to a JSON file.

update-attachment-description-pdf.title: Update File Attachment Description in PDF
update-attachment-description-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to locate a file attachment annotation in a PDF, modify its description, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-attachment-to-password-protected-pdf.title: Add Attachment to Password-Protected PDF
add-attachment-to-password-protected-pdf.description: Shows how to open an encrypted PDF with a user password, embed a file as an attachment, and save the document while keeping it encrypted.

extract-attachments-from-encrypted-pdf.title: Extract Attachments from Encrypted PDF
extract-attachments-from-encrypted-pdf.description: Shows how to open an encrypted PDF with a password, decrypt it, and extract all embedded file attachments to a specified folder using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-attachment-size-before-adding-t.title: Validate Attachment Size Before Adding to PDF
validate-attachment-size-before-adding-t.description: Loads an existing PDF, checks each file's size against a defined limit, and attaches only the files that meet the size requirement using Aspose.Pdf file attachment annotations.

batch-add-attachment-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Attachment to PDFs
batch-add-attachment-to-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a folder of PDF files and embed the same attachment into each document using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-extract-pdf-attachments-to-zip.title: Batch Extract PDF Attachments to ZIP Archive
batch-extract-pdf-attachments-to-zip.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through multiple PDF files, extract all embedded file attachments, and store them in a consolidated ZIP archive using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-portfolio-with-attachments.title: Create PDF Portfolio with Attachments
create-pdf-portfolio-with-attachments.description: Demonstrates how to build a PDF Portfolio by creating a document, adding a page with text, embedding multiple files as attachments, and saving the result.

add-word-document-to-pdf-portfolio.title: Add a Word Document to a PDF Portfolio
add-word-document-to-pdf-portfolio.description: Shows how to embed a Word (.docx) file into a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf, turning the PDF into a portfolio with an attached file.

insert-excel-into-pdf-portfolio.title: Insert Excel Workbook into PDF Portfolio with Description
insert-excel-into-pdf-portfolio.description: Shows how to embed an existing Excel workbook into a PDF portfolio and assign a custom description to the attachment using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-image-into-pdf-portfolio.title: Embed Image into PDF Portfolio with Display Name
embed-image-into-pdf-portfolio.description: Demonstrates how to embed an image file into a PDF portfolio and assign a custom display name using Aspose.Pdf.

add-nested-pdf-to-portfolio.title: Add Nested PDF to Existing PDF Portfolio
add-nested-pdf-to-portfolio.description: Shows how to embed a PDF file as a nested item inside an existing PDF Portfolio (collection) using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-portfolio-with-multiple-embed.title: Create PDF Portfolio with Multiple Embedded Files
create-pdf-portfolio-with-multiple-embed.description: Demonstrates how to add several files of different types to a PDF portfolio in a single loop using Aspose.Pdf.

compress-pdf-portfolio-with-optimization.title: Compress PDF Portfolio Using Optimization Options
compress-pdf-portfolio-with-optimization.description: Shows how to open an existing PDF Portfolio, enable object compression via OptimizationOptions, and save the compressed PDF.

extract-embedded-files-from-pdf-portfoli.title: Extract Embedded Files from PDF Portfolio
extract-embedded-files-from-pdf-portfoli.description: Shows how to load a PDF portfolio with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over its embedded files, and write each file to a structured directory hierarchy on disk.

extract-embedded-file-from-pdf-portfolio.title: Extract Embedded File from PDF Portfolio by Index
extract-embedded-file-from-pdf-portfolio.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate an embedded file by its 1‑based index, and save it using the original file name and extension.

remove-embedded-file-from-pdf-portfolio.title: Remove Embedded File from PDF Portfolio by Index
remove-embedded-file-from-pdf-portfolio.description: Shows how to delete a specific embedded file from a PDF portfolio using its collection index with Aspose.Pdf.

delete-pdf-outline-items-matching-text.title: Delete PDF Outline Items Matching Text
delete-pdf-outline-items-matching-text.description: Loads a PDF, searches its outline (bookmark) entries for a specific description text, and removes the matching items before saving the cleaned document.

reorder-pdf-outline-items.title: Reorder PDF Outline Items (Swap First Two)
reorder-pdf-outline-items.description: Demonstrates how to swap the first two outline (bookmark) items in a PDF by removing and re‑adding them in the desired order using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-visual-template-to-pdf-portfolio.title: Apply Visual Template to PDF Portfolio Pages
apply-visual-template-to-pdf-portfolio.description: Demonstrates how to load an existing PDF Portfolio, add a semi‑transparent header graphic and title text to each page using Aspose.PDF.Drawing classes, and save the modified document.

generate-pdf-page-thumbnails.title: Generate Thumbnails for Each PDF Page
generate-pdf-page-thumbnails.description: Demonstrates how to create a thumbnail image for every page of a PDF portfolio using Aspose.Pdf's Drawing API and compile them into a new PDF document.

merge-pdf-portfolios-preserve-metadata.title: Merge Two PDF Portfolios While Preserving Metadata
merge-pdf-portfolios-preserve-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to combine two PDF Portfolio files into a single document using Aspose.Pdf, while retaining both standard document and XMP metadata from the first portfolio.

convert-pdf-to-portfolio-with-embedded-f.title: Convert PDF to Portfolio with Embedded Files
convert-pdf-to-portfolio-with-embedded-f.description: Demonstrates how to load a regular PDF, embed multiple files, and automatically convert it into a PDF Portfolio using Aspose.Pdf.

flatten-pdf-portfolio.title: Flatten PDF Portfolio to Standard PDF
flatten-pdf-portfolio.description: Shows how to load a PDF Portfolio, flatten it to remove interactive collection features, and save it as a regular PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

read-pdf-metadata-attachment-count.title: Read PDF Metadata and Count Attachments
read-pdf-metadata-attachment-count.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, read its standard metadata fields, count embedded file attachments, and output a concise report.

generate-csv-report-of-pdf-attachments.title: Generate CSV Report of PDF Attachments
generate-csv-report-of-pdf-attachments.description: Loads a PDF, enumerates its embedded file attachments, and creates a CSV file listing each attachment's name, size, and description.

add-in-memory-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add In-Memory Attachment to PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
add-in-memory-attachment-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to embed a file into a PDF using a MemoryStream, avoiding any intermediate disk writes, and then save the PDF to another MemoryStream.

attach-remote-file-to-pdf.title: Attach Remote File to PDF as File Attachment Annotation
attach-remote-file-to-pdf.description: Downloads a file from a remote URL into memory and embeds it in a PDF as a file‑attachment annotation using Aspose.Pdf.

add-file-attachment-to-pdf-with-error-ha.title: Add File Attachment to PDF with Error Handling
add-file-attachment-to-pdf-with-error-ha.description: Demonstrates how to attach a file to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf while checking for missing source files and handling possible PDF processing errors.

validate-attachment-mime-type.title: Validate Attachment MIME Type Before Adding to PDF
validate-attachment-mime-type.description: Shows how to verify that an attachment's MIME type matches its file extension and then embed the file into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-extract-remove-pdf-attachments.title: Add, Extract, and Remove PDF Attachments with Timing
add-extract-remove-pdf-attachments.description: Demonstrates how to add a file attachment annotation to a PDF, extract the attached file, and remove the annotation while measuring the execution time of each operation.

embed-attachment-metadata-in-pdf.title: Embed Attachment and Add Metadata to PDF Document Info
embed-attachment-metadata-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to embed a file into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, store custom attachment metadata in the document information dictionary, and save the updated PDF.

add-unicode-file-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add Unicode File Attachment to PDF
add-unicode-file-attachment-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF (if missing), attaching a file with a Unicode display name using a FileAttachmentAnnotation, and saving the updated document.

extract-pdf-attachments-sha256.title: Extract PDF Attachments and Compute SHA‑256 Hashes
extract-pdf-attachments-sha256.description: Loads a PDF, enumerates its embedded file attachments, and calculates a SHA‑256 hash for each attachment to verify integrity.

add-image-watermark-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Image Watermark to All PDF Pages
add-image-watermark-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, create a WatermarkArtifact from an image, configure its opacity and background placement, add it to the page artifacts, and save the watermarked document.

add-file-attachment-with-retry.title: Add File Attachment to PDF with Retry Logic
add-file-attachment-with-retry.description: Demonstrates attaching a file to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and implementing retry handling for I/O errors when the PDF is stored on a network share.

extract-embedded-attachments-parallel.title: Extract Embedded Attachments from PDFs in Parallel
extract-embedded-attachments-parallel.description: Demonstrates how to concurrently extract embedded files from multiple PDF documents using Aspose.Pdf and Parallel.ForEach, saving each attachment to a dedicated folder.

verify-pdf-size-increases-with-attachmen.title: Verify PDF Size Increases When Adding File Attachment
verify-pdf-size-increases-with-attachmen.description: Demonstrates a unit test that creates a blank PDF, adds a file attachment annotation, and asserts that the PDF size grows as expected.

attachment-removal-integration-tests.title: Attachment Removal Integration Tests
attachment-removal-integration-tests.description: Shows how to write NUnit integration tests that verify removing, clearing, and removing by index updates the Attachments collection count in a response object.

embed-hidden-xml-metadata-attachment.title: Embed Hidden XML Metadata as PDF Attachment
embed-hidden-xml-metadata-attachment.description: Creates or loads a PDF, builds an XML document with metadata, serializes it to a stream, and embeds it as a hidden file attachment annotation in the PDF.
